steps.title: Find the shared feature
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a similarity between the two board games. The notes show the shared feature clearly: both designers created games inspired by works of fiction.

steps.title: Reject one-sided details
steps.content: A mentions only Keller's game. C mentions only Journey to the Center of the Earth. D mentions only Lindgren's game. None of those choices compares the two games.

steps.title: State the similarity
steps.content: Saying both games were inspired by works of fiction directly emphasizes the shared trait. The answer is B.
